title: Squirrel Removal in Sunset Park, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Sunset Park, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Squirrels invading your Sunset Park home or business? Our professional squirrel removal services protect Brooklyn properties from these persistent rodents that can damage attics, chew wiring, and create health hazards. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective squirrel extraction and exclusion services throughout Sunset Park, from the brownstones near the waterfront to the multi-family buildings along 5th Avenue.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of squirrel removal experience to Sunset Park, with certified technicians who understand the unique challenges of Brooklyn's diverse architecture. We offer same-day service, humane removal methods, comprehensive exclusion work, and warranties that give you lasting peace of mind.
localContext: Sunset Park's tree-lined streets and proximity to Green-Wood Cemetery create ideal squirrel habitats, leading to frequent intrusions in the neighborhood's historic row houses, newer condos, and commercial buildings along 8th Avenue. The area's mix of older construction and mature trees means squirrels often find easy access points through deteriorated soffits, roof vents, and gaps in building exteriors common in pre-war buildings.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Sunset Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Sunset Park typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How do squirrels get into Sunset Park homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly enter through roof vents, soffit gaps, chimney openings, and deteriorated fascia boards. In Sunset Park's older buildings, squirrels exploit construction gaps and aging materials. They only need a 2-inch opening to gain entry and often expand smaller holes by chewing.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, non-lethal trapping methods that comply with New York State regulations. After safely capturing squirrels, we relocate them according to legal guidelines and seal all entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring a permanent solution without harm to the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Sunset Park property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Sunset Park. Most squirrel removals are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. Emergency services are available for urgent situations involving property damage or squirrels inside living spaces.
